query: sickly yellow green tint photograph unhealthy skin tone
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — yellow/green sickly tints, jaundice and unhealthy color casts

response.objective_caption: A teenage girl with light brown hair wearing a magenta top rests her chin on her hand while holding a red pen near her face. She gazes off to the side with a neutral expression. Behind her, wooden shelves hold folded clothes, books, and other items in what appears to be a bedroom or dorm room.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A teenage girl with light brown hair wearing a magenta top rests her chin on her hand while holding a red pen near her face in a casually framed snapshot with amateur energy. Harsh flash lighting creates bright specular hotspots on her skin and casts hard shadows across the scene. She gazes off to the side with a neutral expression, while wooden shelves holding folded clothes, books, and other items fill the background of what appears to be a bedroom or dorm room.
